reviews.review_text: Newest,cleanest 🙂fishing across Rd.Small5min drive to town,Kalbarri you will love it from miss freddi 🐸 local of 50 yrs.xxxC,mon xiam a local of 50 yrs and friends,many have stayed with you. We visited and couldn't believe how clean,and safe your park is Freddi fletcher🐸🐸🐸x
Quite a small space with ensuite camping but enough for me & my dog. Accross from gorgeous dog friendly beach. Lovely staff... nice kitchen with huge TV. Super quiet atm 😊

Our family really enjoyed our three night stay at Red Bluff Tourist Park. Probably one of the nicest caravan parks we have been to! Large grassy sites, loved the ensuite, lovely pool and a great location just out of town. Red Bluff Beach and the coastal cliffs just down the road.
The staff were also kind enough to do some printing for us and allow a slightly later check out.  Thank you so much, hopefully we will be back again in the future!
Lovely site. Excellent Facilities that were spotlessly clean. We only stayed one night in our motorhome but the en suite was great. Loved the pool and BBQ area as well.
Happy staying there. We saw kangaroo inside the park.

This park was absolutely outstanding, beautiful and clean green grass sites and trees in between each. Park management so friendly and helpful. They love this place and it shows in the appearance of the park. Highly recommend staying here
Very near to town. Very convenient to drive everywhere. Our family is very enjoyed this stay with cooking, chatting outside balcony.

Wow, what a gem ! Ensuite sites only, very nice location just outside the town. Fabrizio and Irene are 200% commited and as a guest you really feel that ! One of our best experiences ever - 100% recommended !

We initially booked 2 nights on a powered ensuite site and ended up extending our stay. Sites were very well maintained, with the gardener keeping busy mowing and watering the lawn every day. The camp kitchen was clean and spacious as were the ensuites. All staff were friendly and most accommodating. Loved it and will be back for sure.
Really nice setup and organisation
Simplemente espectacular. Todo perfecto. Super recomendado

Powered ensuite site.  Ensuite a good size.  Sites are nice but artificial grass is too hot to walk on in the summer.  Decent camp kitchen with all the amenities.  The pool is lovely.  Nice location out of town.
Lovely campsite. Very friendly and welcoming staff, great suggestions for things to see in Kalbarri and future journey ideas. Real treat to see up close some early morning visitors!
Schöner kleiner Campsite. Ganz nah an einem wunderbaren Strand. Zu jedem Platz gehört ein kleines WC Häuschen mit Dusche. Ein Luxus, wenn man auf Campsites unterwegs ist.

Super camping, très calme avec de grand emplacement pour les caravanes. Il y’a des toilettes privées pour chaque place ce qui est vraiment très agréable. Le camping se situe à côté d’un joli lookout et d’une belle plage. Pour séjourner quelques jours avec sa caravane je conseil vivement.

Camped on an ensuite site. Really nice location and facilities at the caravan park were good. Toilet and showers were clean and the shared kitchen area was really useful to have. Decent sized grassed sites.
Amazing views|Modern and clean ocean view villa |Comfy beds|Friendly staff |Beautiful pool area |Would love to stay here again

Great experience! Great hospitality!
The staff was amazingly friendly!
Thanks a lot!!!😊
A fantastic site. Great staff and excellent facilities.

Excellent campsite with powered and ensuite facilities for motor homes.
Well maintained and nicely positioned near the beach.
쪽빛 인도양과 풍화된 멋진 해안 절벽을 볼수있었으며 캠핑장도 깨끗하고 시설이 좋았다.
Most amazing place on earth but no pets allowed 😢
First time i took my partner camping and she was reluctant at first.   However staying at red bluff has now changed her mind.   We both loved it.
Stayed in a ensuite site, staff were friendly and facilities were clean and in good order. Late check in process very easy, just let them know beforehand

Top Lage, sehr sauber und gepflegt, großer, gepflegter Pool, die durchweg ebenen Rasenplätze sind alle mit Ensuite-Bad, Gemeinschaftsküche sauber und mit allen nötigen Dingen (Spülmittel, saubere Schwämme und Geschirrtücher) ausgestattet.
Wenn ich etwas anmerken dürfte, dann nur der Wunsch nach einer etwas größeren Ablage im Ensuite-Bad - im Moment gibt es dort keine richtige Ablagemöglichkeit.
Ansonsten der beste (ja, und auch teuerste) Campingplatz unserer Campertour.

We are at red bluff caravan park at the moment, it’s over 30 degrees and there is no shade at the pool area , only one single umbrella, and 6 chairs, so we took our own shade and chairs , the female office lady ( manager ) came over and told us we couldn’t have our own shade and we had to remove it when we left and ask her permission if we wanted to use our own shade , she said she took a photo and if there was any issues she would put them back on us , repeatedly saying it , we explained that the pool area was unusable with out shade but she didn’t care , about 10 minutes later a male ( manager ) gardener came up to us and aggressively accused us of removing a garden hose from nearby grass outside the pool area , when we said we didn’t he pretty much said we were lying and not to use our shade again, I told him he was being aggressive but he said oh well, we are a family with two vans , Nan , granddad ,mum dad and three young children,
We have two more nights her and now feel uncomfortable and can’t use the pool area ,
The place is also not very clean, we paid over $80 a night for a caravan bay each and are now wishing we stayed else were ,

We are at red bluff caravan park at the moment, it’s over 30 degrees and there is no shade at the pool area , only one single umbrella, and 6 chairs, so we took our own shade and chairs , the female office lady ( manager ) came over and told us we couldn’t have our own shade and we had to remove it when we left and ask her permission if we wanted to use our own shade , she said she took a photo and if there was any issues she would put them back on us , repeatedly saying it , we explained that the pool area was unusable with out shade but she didn’t care , about 10 minutes later a male ( manager ) gardener came up to us and aggressively accused us of removing a garden hose from nearby grass outside the pool area , when we said we didn’t he pretty much said we were lying and not to use our shade again, I told him he was being aggressive but he said oh well, we are a family with two vans , Nan , granddad ,mum dad and three young children, |We have two more nights her and now feel uncomfortable and can’t use the pool area , |The place is also not very clean, we paid over $80 a night for a caravan bay each and are now wishing we stayed else were ,
Had ensuite caravan site.  Park is only 5 years old and has been done very well.  Good size pool and ensuites.  Staff were very helpful.  Park has great ocean views too.

Nothing to fault here.
THE place to stay

Awesome campsite!
Loved this place — super clean, great facilities, friendly staff and perfect location. Nice shady spots, good showers, and a really relaxed vibe. Would definitely stay here again!

Great location, a great view of Red Bluff, excellent facilities and dog friendly.
Stayed on a ensuite camp site.  Clean, flat and grassy.
A quiet park with the best camp kitchen I've seen yet!
Definitely staying here again 😊

Super clean ensuite
Nice lawn site and crystal clean kitchen and laundry
Definitely one of the best holiday park

Loved this caravan park! We’ve been road tripping from Broome to Perth, and appreciated having our own ensuite. The grounds were well kept and incredibly spacious. Lots of privacy.

Lovely staff at checkin, with a small selection of ice creams to buy.
One of the best camping park in Kalbarri, sites are very tidy. Facilities are clean and staff has always been very helpful.
En prenant l'emplacement "ensuite site" on a douche et WC dans un cabanon chauffé et fermant à clé à disposition à côté

We stayed here in our caravan, it was lovely to have on suite, they were spotlessly clean. Staff were friendly and helpful. We would recommend staying here, close to beach and dog friendly. We will definitely go back

Modern and brand new holiday park.

Located beside the beach, cliffs and Kalbarri National Park. A few kilometres from town.

Multiple accomodation options, some with elevated ocean views.

Swimming pool.

BBQ area under cover with lighting.

Everything is to a high standard.
Great location. Superb clean powered ensuite caravan toilet. Loves the grass. Great facilities like common kitchen. Only cons is the fire of the right gas stove in the kitchen is not strong.
Beautiful camp location with nice en suite facilities. Staff are all extremely friendly and helpful- highly recommend.
What a delightful surprise...immaculate facilities, beautiful pool, stunning views
Great park, clean, great blocks, excellent laundry, staff are very helpful ( thank you so much ) and friendly.  Love it, stayed 6 nights. We'll be back for sure.
Great little park. Had issue with 12v power and rang the manger, they couldn't be more helpful.  From offering bags of ice, to using fridges until we fixed the problem.
Highly recommend this park. It is small and quiet but ammenities are immaculate with the ensuite. Staff were lovely and just small drive into town.
It was ok.  Nothing special but then again not crap.
This was the nicest cabin I have ever stayed in, in a tourist park. So spacious, clean and comfortable. Great views and sunsets from the spacious balcony. Even spotted some whales breaching.

We absolutely loved Red Bluff! We had a great spot with an ocean view right over the fence. The ensuite was spotless, the camp kitchen was spacious and well equipped, and the laundry even accepts card payments. Most importantly: the staff were incredibly friendly!

We absolutely loved Red Bluff! We had a great spot with an ocean view right over the fence. The ensuite was spotless, the camp kitchen was spacious and well equipped, and the laundry even accepts card payments. Most importantly: the staff were incredibly friendly!
One of the best caravan parks we’ve stayed in. Everything is new,

We really enjoyed our stay at Kalbarri Red Bluff Tourist Park. While it’s a little on the expensive side, we found it well worth it for the fresh, modern ensuite site we booked, everything felt new and well looked after. The whole park was spotless and beautifully maintained, with great new amenities. A special mention to the reception staff who were extremely helpful and welcoming, making the check-in process a breeze. A lovely spot to stay in Kalbarri!
Beautiful park in a great location. Facilities clean and tidy. Would definitely stay here again.
Nice place to stay

We really enjoyed our stay at Red Bluff. It is located right next to the cliffs and a lovely beach at the end of the street. Camp-site is well maintained and the staff is very friendly. It was very quiet, except for the sound of the waves 😉  |Just two little things that might be a thing: the location is a bit out of town, it is definitely not "on walking distance" and there is some noise coming from the road next to the camp-site. Both didn't bother us, but could be something to consider.

All sites have ensuites. Everything clean and tidy. One of the best tourist parks we have been to (been travelling around Australia since early May). I would recommend this park. Kalbarri is a lovely town as well
Love love love would stay again

Stayed on a caravansite, each site has its own ensuite and are kept well clean. Staff are very friendly and helpful.
Please note due to each site has it's own ensuite you will be paying alittle more for this. Laundry is tap and pay for washing machine $5, dryer is coin's.
I wouldn't hesitate in recommending and staying here again.
Clean, well maintained, loved the ensuites,and grass sites. Would definitely stay again. 5 mins out of Kalbarri, but beautiful
Booked an ensuite camp site.  Cleanest, tidiest and most well appointed caravan park ever!
Top spot
Great park , nice and new , amenities are great big sites not sitting on top of one another,  excellent location

This park is absolutely beautiful! The place is IMMACULATE....Well done to the cleaners and maintenance here. As a couple lucky enough to travel frequently, we've stayed in hundreds of places, but this park tops the lot! Friendly staff and stunning location. We will be back! Thank you to all staff here..Site 31
Righy on Red Bluff, fantastic park 👌🏻
Great park ,well kept every site has an unsuited. But very expensive.

Fantastic place to stay if you can swallow FEEs

The location of this place is almost egregious. Smack on the edge of the national park, on the ocean side of the hwy.
Camped. Was clean and staff were super nice.
Don't expect WiFi to work, could get muddy in heaviest rain. Ensuite arrangement very novel and welcome.
Site 38 great for staying with dogs!
Great, clean, modern and friendly. Good location. Happy to recommend.

Horrible horrible experience….. customer service is 00000…. TEMU product. Me n my friend booked our holidays 9 months ago in advance so nothing goes wrong n we booked as group . When we reached there lady on counter said they can’t put us together…. After few arguments we said just leave it n it’s ok …. After I reached to my camper site it was next to the main road n ensuite was half the size they show us (no 27-28) pics r in attachment . U can’t even change ur cloths in that small ensuite. When I go back to them n tell them about this problem a lady was so mean and the man was in charge was very very rude n he said u r the UNLUCKY one got that site …. He said 4-5 time same thing .i m not here to check my luck . I was there to enjoy with my family .  We r trying to requested them to change our site as few of the site was still empty… he was angry and doesn’t want to listen anything.
I have never experienced this kind of customer service before . So awful. N also aware of going there …. Need to resolve this issue …

Horrible horrible experience….. customer service is 00000…. TEMU product. Me n my friend booked our holidays 9 months ago in advance so nothing goes wrong n we booked as group . When we reached there lady on counter said they can’t put us together…. After few arguments we said just leave it n it’s ok …. After I reached to my camper site it was next to the main road n ensuite was half the size they show us (no 27-28) pics r in attachment . U can’t even change ur cloths in that small ensuite. When I go back to them n tell them about this problem a lady was so mean and the man was in charge was very very rude n he said u r the UNLUCKY one got that site …. He said 4-5 time same thing .i m not here to check my luck . I was there to enjoy with my family .  We r trying to requested them to change our site as few of the site was still empty… he was angry and doesn’t want to listen anything. |I have never experienced this kind of customer service before . So awful. N also aware of going there …. Need to resolve this issue …
Clean. Well maintained. A lovely site. Not noisy despite school holidays. The view was amazing. Love the private bathroom! Will come back.
2nd time staying at this resort & it did not disappoint. Easy check in, selection of snacks, ice creams etc available in the office & amazing view

가족 여행하기 좋았습니다.
5명이 숙박가능합니다.

We really enjoyed our stay here. It is a very well maintained park. We were on an ensuite powered site and were very happy with it. The camp kitchen was one of our favourites throughout our trip. There were also some great spaces for kids to play.
Great new park

Loved our family stay at this beautiful, clean and quiet location. A great base for exploring and relaxing. The units are new, spacious and well equipped. All kitchen items you might need have been thought of. Staying a little out of town was excellent - the views are magnificent and you don’t have the hustle/bustle of town. The en-suite powered sites look excellent. Kids loved the grassed playing field.

“Mummy, I love these lights” said my 7 year old referencing the bunker lights. And while the kids have lamps and night lights at home, nothing can compare to bunker lights, in bunk beds on holidays.

Such is the family orientated attention to detail the only a family run park, such as Sunmerstar can provide. A sandwhich press big enough for four toasties in one go, is just one example of a thoughtfully kitted out, family friendly kitchen.

Plenty of green space for playing (endless) games of kick to kick. Very clean, well maintained amenities.

We had a terrific stay at Red Bluff. My husband and I will be back for peace and quiet and glorious sunsets. Our kids will be back for the bunker lights.
Brilliant place. Great park. Great staff. Great amenities. Will be back.

We have thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
Van sites are big enough, ensuite large Modern and clean. Camp kitchen is large, Clean and  well equipped. All in all a fantastic place to stay.
Ensuite is great, clean. Park is in a great location.
This is the best caravan park of the 10 we stayed in WA. Great location, sites have private bathrooms. Everything is clean, and the location is wonderful.
Good place for a holiday

The place was really really nice and very well kept.
The facilities were clean and camp kitchen was great to use whilst camping.
The management were fantastic to deal with and allowed us to park up with our boat on.
Highly recommended to stay here

Exceptionally clean and modern
Amenities are spectacular
Customer service was amazing

Excellent park, well above average.  The en-suite bathrooms are clean and roomy.

The location is fantastic with a short walk to a great beach.
Absolutely perfect — from the location and amenities to the great tips on how to make the most of our stay. We had an ensuite site, and were thrilled with it.

Schöner Campingplatz direkt in Meernähe, in 2 Gehminuten ist man am Strand.
Unserer Campingplatz hatte ein separates Badezimmer, was sauber und alles notwendige besitzte.
Great place, we didn't have a room just a toilet and shower. Very clean and tidy lovely place with a nice pool. Highly recommend it if passing through.
Best ensuite we have had. Clean, pllenty of hot water and very good shower. Large pitches. Great kitchen/laundry facilities. Right across the road from beach.
We had a lovely stay, the grounds were well kept, the ensuite was clean and the staff were friendly. Fabulous sunset views, but not walking distance to town.

I’ve stayed here three times on the past five years - late 2020, late 2023 and then again last week (May 2025). I’ve always enjoyed my stay and never had any issues. I was also due to stay 14-16/05 but unfortunately hit a roo five mins out of Kalbarri. I emailed reception to let them know (did not expect a refund or anything along those lines) and they kindly gave me a credit. I will definitely be back once my car is fixed.
Great clean park and friendly helpful staff
Gorgeous and well managed caravan park.  Every site has an ensuit.  The pool was fresh but fantastic.  Sunsets were spectacular and only a short walk to the bluff.
Loved our stay over Easter. Have rebooked for the following year. Rooms were clean and well appointed with comfy beds. Excellent location.
Magnificent caravan park with every site having your own ensuite.

We booked a Premium Chalet through booking.com.  We were allocated a chalet at the back of the property near the road and not one of the chalets at the front.  We checked the front chalets were available and less expensive than we paid.

We were told that was because they charge more to cover the booking fee.  That's a first for us.

The chalets are new and well appointed apart from the fact they have no soap/shampoo in the bathrooms.

They do not have a BBQ, you have to use the public one. It's a long way from the back corner where were stayed.

There are unfriendly signs everywhere.

We did a trip from Broome to Perth.  This was the most expensive accommodation and the least welcoming.
ensuites amazing, gorgeous spot away from the main part of Kalbarri but we loved it! Thanks guys!
A1 service staff, site and amenities. Excellent.

We had a wonderful stay at the Red Bluff caravan park in Kalbarri! I was truly impressed by the quality of the facilities. It feels like Western Australia has finally caught up with the rest of the country. The sites are spacious, fully grassed, and each one comes with its own ensuite. The shady trees provide a lovely ambiance and will only get better as they mature. The camp kitchen is the best I’ve encountered in WA—large, sheltered from the wind, and equipped with everything you could possibly need. We were so pleased with our experience that we’ll definitely be booking here again when we return to Kalbarri!

Will definitely stay here again! So close to the beach we were able to walk down and enjoy the sunset each night. The ensuites are perfect and the shared kitchen was clean and had what we needed. Sites were nice and tidy as well.
Park looks 100% on the last time we were here 3 yrs ago.  Absolutely spotless!  Beaut people!
아주 멋진 자연과 만날수있다.
Séjour de 2 nuits au red bluff ,caravan Park très confortable ,salle de bain privée sur chaque emplacement ,espace cuisine très complet et propre .Piscine très agréable .Personnel très efficace.

Situato in posizione panoramica e strategica per visitare il Kalbarri N.P. Vicino a una spiaggia splendida. Pulito e ben attrezzato. Tranquillo e dotato di ottimi servizi. Abbiamo apprezzato il bagno ensuite...ovvero... ogni piazzola ha il proprio bagno. Finalmente un bagno pulito tutto per noi.
Great spot on the coast. Belinda was very helpful to make our stay comfortable. The grounds were spotless as well as the ensuites. Just an excellent, quiet place.
Newly renovated with all basic amenities . Good for holiday home and walking distance to the nearest beach .

10/10 Don’t think it can get any better for a caravan park. Talk about a location !!
Amenities and everything you need is here!
Highly highly recommend. Still have one night to stay here and will add some photos later.

Great place to stay, friendly helpful staff.
Lovely having an en suite, everything immaculate😊
Well done and thanks for a great stay
One of the cleanest and neatest caravan parks I've stayed at. Ensuites were spotless.

Had the Best time for australia day week end at this Beautiful clean Caravan park. 5 Stars ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ The staff are friendly and helpful. The caravan park is clean and neat and tidy. Very very Happy I highly recommend this park
獨立兩房大屋，一張雙人大床，一張單人床和一張上下架子床足夠一家人安睡。設施、衛生都非常好！比卡爾巴裡鎮的其他Motel更靠近海灘，且房間空間都更大。距離卡爾巴裡鎮3分鐘車程，吃飯購物完全沒有問題。距離粉紅湖40-50分鐘車程。

By far the best place weve stayed with our caravan, what a gem. We actually had the pitch in online picture with Landrover camper in it. The view over the back was amazing and in front is the pool. The park is clean tidy and the staff are always working hard to maintain it. The staff were super friendly and Belinda, Sage and the Asian cleaning lady (sorry didnt get her name) stand out as they always had time for a chat and laugh while doing their stuff.
The Pool is lovely and big, could do with a few more sunloungers and umbrellas but people dont stay there long as theres other stuff to do. There is no jumpy pillow or other kids entertainment and we liked this, please dont get one!! , this isnt that type of park, we took the kids to the beach which 100 metres away, climbed the rocks, watched the crabs and the birds, walk to the top of Red Bluff, there is a path all the way to town that is mostly away from the road, its 4.5 kms to town, a nice ride. Nice and quiet at night which is what you want, just the crashing of the waves to drift off to!!
Kalbarri town is fantastic and I could write another chapter on that but the feeding of the pelicans is an absolute must for a gold coin donation. We will be back and soon!!

Loved it here
Was there for 3 nights
Staff were so lovely
Park is very nice and clean
Highly recommend
Will be back definitely

Wir waren mit einer Wohnmobil auf dem Campingplatz. Der Campingplatz ist sehr sauber und gepflegt. Die Küche ist auch gut. Die eigene Dusche und Toilette sind super und waren auch sehr sauber. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt und würden auf jeden Fall wiederkommen.
Great place to stay, clean and tidy and friendly staff

Absolutely gem! Location is great near the lookout and beach. Very short drive to town as well. Room was extremely clean and well maintained and got all you need for a family trip. Best thing is the view! Stunning sunset view right from the balcony !
Beautiful place and location
Toller Campingplatz! Wir waren dort insgesamt drei Nächte mit unserem Motorhome. Die gesamte Anlage ist sehr gepflegt. Das eigene Bad mit Dusche und WC war sehr sauber. Auch die Küche war toll.

We had a powered site, for our caravan
Each site, regardless if it's a tent or van, has an ensuite. The ensuite has a decent sized shower, sink and toilet. There is plenty of room to store your gear, if you don't want to  leave it on your site, such as fishing rods. The sites are grassy, well maintained and clean
The pool area is lovely, only two gripes. There are only about 6 lounges and it's only open to 6pm.
The staff were lovely and helpful.
The reception sells ice creams and a few other things that were reasonably priced. An ice cream van came through daily which were also pretty well priced. $3 for a soft serve ice
cream.
The beach is a 2 min walk, which is good for fishing, swimming and whatever.
I definitely recommend this caravan park and I would definitely return.

Beautiful location. The holiday park is well maintained and staff were very welcoming on our arrival.

Our cabin was very clean, spacious and comfortable with everything we needed. The pool area is lovely as well as the bbq areas.
Short walk to a lovely little beach.

Thank you for a great stay!

By far the best park we’ve ever stayed at. Powered sites with your own ensuit! Magical location, sheltered from the wind and amazing views. Dog friendly and only 5 mins from town. Fantastic amenities and so clean and tidy. Free WIFI is fast and strong. Fantastic pool area, camp kitchen is super clean with great amenities. Laundry is great ($5 a load). You pay a little more to stay here, but well worth it!  Also great service from Belinda in the office. She’s always so friendly and helpful. Stayed for a little over a week and thoroughly loved it. Even extended for a few days. One strange thing is that the rate changes all the time. One day we paid $89, the next $72 and then it was $82. I found this very confusing and really still don’t understand why? We stay in a lot of parks and it’s always a set daily rate. It’s the only negative I can think of though.

Fabulous location little short drive out of town but on best beach with best sunset vantage spot. Spotless park with greenery and buffering trees for the camp sites. New cabins have ocean outlook all immaculate and new facilities on site. Pool crystal fresh clean. By FAR BEST tourist Park to stay. Friendly staff. Own ensuite for each site. Glamping at its best. Value for money. Gorgeous coastline to explore by foot to trek between lookouts. Bring your furry friend they are welcome too. Best coffee van for morning walk at Jake's Beach. Cannot recommend enough. We are here now and it's a dream location for excellent price.

Perfekter Campingplatz!

Dieser Platz ist absolut empfehlenswert! Die Lage ist traumhaft, mit wunderschöner Aussicht und toller Nähe zur Natur. Besonders beeindruckt hat uns die Sauberkeit und der Komfort: Jeder Stellplatz hat eine eigene private Toilette und Dusche – das ist wirklich außergewöhnlich.

Die Stellplätze sind zudem mit gepflegtem Rasen ausgestattet, was für eine angenehme und gemütliche Atmosphäre sorgt. Ein idealer Ort, um zu entspannen und die Natur zu genießen. Wir würden wiederkommen!

Wonderful caravan park was totally impressed with every aspect of our ten day stay here over Xmas. Perfect location with nice walks and easy drive into town. The design of the park really is excellent. Huge great sites with individual modern ensuites. Lovely big pool which we used every day. Dog friendly. Lovely people working around the ground are always ready with a smile. Special mention for Sage always up for a laugh. It's more expensive but totally worth it as it was nothing like your typical coastal van park but instead really peaceful. We loved our stay here!
Great site . Flat and grassy.En suites a real bonus.

Spacious sites, clean & tidy, 5 min drive to town centre, expensive. As a full time travelling couple we have stayed in many parks and have never had issues with early check ins within reason. We arrived around 12 and asked nicely if we could check in anytime before the 2. They were not accommodating nor helpful even though the park was near empty…. Not very nice to speak to either.
Beautiful spot to park your van and enjoy sunset. We had a nice time and stayed the night in a park nearby by, short walk to beach.
Great place that isn't BIG4.

I recently stayed at Kalbarri Red Bluff Tourist Park and found it to have some strong points, but also several drawbacks. The location is great—right next to the beach, which is perfect for beach lovers. However, it's a bit out of town and just off the main road, so if you’re a light sleeper, be aware that the traffic noise at night can be quite disruptive.

The winds can also be strong in the evenings due to the proximity to the beach, which may not be ideal for everyone.

We stayed in an ensuite powered site that had nice green lawns, creating a pleasant atmosphere. Unfortunately, the ensuite itself was poorly maintained, with mould and rust in the shower—it really needed a deep clean. Additionally, there was a lack of shelving, which would be helpful for guests staying longer.

The other amenities were generally good, but they, too, could use some attention. The pool was dirty and definitely required a thorough cleaning, while the camp kitchen areas, although tidy, would benefit from a deep clean as well.

On a positive note, the laundry facilities were excellent, with the convenience of card payments.

Overall, Kalbarri Red Bluff Tourist Park has a lot of potential with its location and amenities, but the cleanliness and maintenance issues need to be addressed to provide a better experience for guests.

A really nice park. Wide, grassy sites, all with a great ensuite. A good camp kitchen and pool. The beaches next to the site are really nice.

It is a short drive to town or an hour's walk, which we did with our dog one day, seeing four different types of lizards and some nice wild flowers while soaking in the ocean views.

Initially had a powered site with an ensuite, unfortunately our caravan broke and they were able to upgrade us to a premium chalet. Lovely chalet with a pretty view of the water.

Nice location with a beach down the road, Red Buff Beach,was quite windy. A couple of beautiful viewing spots along the way, Pot Alley and Rainbow Valley.

Great location on the edge of town, will definitely be back
Great walk down to the bottom. With great views
Little out of the main town but the cleanest and most modern cabins in the area
Very windy location. We were right on the main road and opposite the dump point so not the best camp site... prefer CPs in town due to location.  If you love the beach, it's nice and close.
방이 깔끔하고 좋았어요. 칼바리 근처 숙소가 다 별로여서 걱정 많이 했는데 와서 보니까 너무 좋아서 감동이었어요. 식기류 다 깔끔하고 처음 리셉션에 앉아계신 두 분도 너무 친절하셨습니다.

It’s our third time staying in a cabin at the Red Bluff Caravan Park.  We love the location - perfect place for whale watching and exploring the Bluff.

It has comfortable beds, air conditioning and TV’s  in all rooms (not that we turned on the TV at all). There is USB sockets in the PowerPoints which is handy!

The clothes horse comes in handy for the towels and bathers after a busy day of swimming and fishing - but when it’s super windy… some pegs would be handy, so pack some from home!

A short walk to Jake’s Point, there’s a coffee van most of the time - unless the weather is unkind, but the coffee machine in the cabin is more than enough to get you going for the day.

Only recommendation would be a sharp knife, or a bread knife and some extra bin bags (if you go through large amounts of rubbish like us)

The staff were fabulous when our shower got blocked, very efficient in fixing it.

Highly recommend staying here and will be back again next year.
Each site has an ensuite and grass - which if you have a tent will know that’s rare these days! Immaculate facilities really impressed.
Come for the bluff, stay for the waves

We absolutely loved our stay!! The powered site with ensuite was perfect. Well maintained grounds and really nice staff!
(The only thing I would suggest is shade over the pool 😊)

We will definitely be back! Thank you.
great location for your family to stay
Pelican nest is the best ... quite friendly

We camped for 2 nights as a stopover to Exmouth, site very clean, Ensuites were clean, modern and very spacious, camp kitchen very good, pool let's say was refreshing! but a good size. My only gripe is the road noise but after a while you get used to it. The camping area ground was very good condition and soft under foot.

We had a Premium Ocean View Holiday Unit for three nights costing almost $900.  It was nice and well set-up EXCEPT: the only "toiletries" provided were two small cakes of soap.  No shampoo or even a box of tissues.  We were given a box when we asked, but the policy is not to provide them on hygiene grounds.  Seriously?
We were told a load of claptrap about the environment for not providing single-use shampoo, etc, but they could just put proper dispensers on the wall.  It is penny-pinching and I think they are making a serious mistake with economy measures at such high prices.
It needs to be noted that the park is well out of town and there's no way you can walk to a shop or place to eat.
But Kalbarri is certainly worth visiting.

The sea view chalet was nice enough.  The flooring was lifting in the lounge and there was general wear and tear throughout.
The coffee machine was faulty and the wiring was making a weird noise.
We definitely had pool views, you could see the ocean, but it definitely wasn’t what we expected to see.
Price was $671 for 2 nights.

I'm not usually a fan of this style of camping but we had a great time at this park. There was a mix up with our booking and the staff here did everything they could to sort it out. The facilities are great. Everything is modern and clean. We stayed here through some bad weather (rainy and very windy) so we used the kitchen area a bit and it was really nice.

After nearly 4 months on the road doing our lap, this was by far the best caravan park we have stayed at. The Ensuite sites are immaculate along with the entire park. The staff we excellent and the amenities were fantastic. Only a couple of minutes walking distance to red buff beach. It will be now hard to find another park with the same high standards.
Really good property
Really great place to park your caravan or campervan and top facilities, five stars from me I'll be back.

Rudest staff I’ve come across in a long time. We were about to book a site, had already spoken to reception and said we are going to come back in 5 minutes, just quickly made sure the site wasn’t too windy as we came with a swag. Staff came and yelled at us for “wandering around” and to move the car immediately (car was parked where you park for check in)
Sad, as it was a very nice spot and we were keen to stay. Don’t have time for rude people.

Easy to book online, thought maybe on the pricey side but the excellent service, amenities and the place being super clean made it worth it. We saw a couple of staff members and they were all busy busy but still had time to say gday. Thank you, if we're coming up this way again we'll be booking again.

Beautiful view of the Red Bluffs and the sea with gorgeous sunsets and sunrises as well. You can hear the sea as it puts you to sleep at night. All the rooms were new and modern fitted with USB ports for easy charging of electronic devices. The staff were also very friendly and helpful as well. Highly recommended.
Great caravan park
We stayed in our caravan. Staff were friendly. Park was very clean & all aites have their own ensuites which was fantastic..

To date, we have stayed at this park twice and cannot recommend it enough. Having a big rig, there has been ample space for for our caravan and awning as well as our 4x4 next to it. Staff is super friendly and helpful! The ensuite was superb! All stands are grassed, so we did not have to put down our awning mat.
The kitchen facilities are excellent and well-maintained. The entrance to the park, as well as the roads around the park are sealed. There is a great swimming pool area for the kids and family to enjoy.
We loved the fact that the park is within walking distance to the beach with the Red Bluff cliffs as a backdrop.
We will definitely return to Kalbarri Red Bluff Tourist Park again.
Highly recommended!

Probably the best campsite I’ve ever used! Private bathrooms per pitch, excellent kitchen area and fantastic location! With the added extra of jumping visitors in the night 🦘 it’s my second stay here now and I will most certainly be back!
Very neat and tidy grassed sites. Ensuites a nice touch.
We were lucky enough to watch the whales 🐋  swimming by. Lots of flowers coming out. Good walking path.
Lovely clean modern cabins on the beach with amazing views towards Red Bluff and the ocean
Beautiful facilities with a fantastic view 😍 well worth a stop

Great location. Clean ensuite. Stayed for 2 nights of powered sites. Second day we were out for most of the day, came back to realise someone had pinched our electrical lead. So we paid $75 a night for power and didn’t even get power the second night. Obviously not the owners fault but pretty upsetting to know campers out there stealing others power leads 😣
Great spot with ensuite.
Lovely park ,the team at Red Bluff looked after us with a very clean and well maintained 2 bedroom unit with awesome views of the bay, thanks guys and gals
Beautiful area! All sites are with ensuits. Has a pool, cooking area laundry. Washing machines are 5 bucks a pop, which is steep

Its position just near the Bluff makes it the perfect tucked away escape. The facilities are super clean, and the grounds are well kept. The staff there are friendly and my husband and I were well looked after. We will definitely be returning and recommending it to friends. It gives other high-end parks a run for their money.

Highly recommend this place if you’re travelling to Kalbarri. Located just next to red bluff beach- fantastic views! About 30mins drive away from nature window/ Kalbarri national park
Toilets and shower facilities are the best among the campgrounds I have been to. The toilet and shower was squeaky clean.
Kitchen is good and clean. We really enjoyed our stay here!

Great size tent site, camp kitchen really well set out, powered onsuite nice shower. Friendly people running the show.  Only a few kms from town with an accessible beach right there. Couldn't ask for more.

One of the nicest parks I've stayed at. Peaceful, amazingly well maintained, a really lovely atmosphere. Great spot too, out of the busy-ness of Kalbarri but near the stunning beaches at Red Bluff. Highly recommend.
Bester Campingplatz den ich bis jetzt betreten habe! Alles war einfach perfekt.
Beautiful spot to set up camp. Amenities were great.

Spectacular views and very clean. The inclusions in the units are fantastic - was like a home away from home. We loved staying here and this place really set the standard for our whole trip, every other place we visited didn’t compare! 💯 recommend!
The kids loved being up the road from the beach, rock pools for crab spotting and sunset walks.

One of the BEST parks we have stayed at … We stayed in a Premuim Holiday Unit .. Great space , clean and large kitchen, lounge, family area.
A/c in both room and living room. Bedroom both had TVs and living room had a decent sized TV.

The view over looked the large pool, well maintain gardens and the Red Bluff cliffs.

I would hands down recommend this place .. will definitely be staying again

I visited Kalbarri for a photography trip, and opted to camp at one of the en suit they that had on offer. Being my first time camping I was told that this is a pricier option but honestly I couldn’t have asked for a better stay. The staff were friendly, the en suit was clean and had plenty of room to store anything I didn’t want to take out with me or leave in the tent. There were staff constantly tidying and being attentive to the grounds and the kitchen had all sorts to suit your needs (stove tops, bbq hot plate, fridge, kettle and microwave to name a few)

If I was coming back to Kalbarri any time soon I wouldn’t hesitate to book here again.
晚上會有袋鼠陪你睡覺，很棒的露營地
Really nice spot, very clean and with all the appliances you may need for a short stay. Loads of Kangaroos as well.
Check in 並未告知要自行處理垃圾，我們退房時將垃圾打包分類留在廚房，沒有拿到園區的垃圾集中處，結果因為這樣被扣了$40澳幣的清潔費，真的很令人不開心！已經將房間都打掃乾淨了，居然只差垃圾的問題被扣錢，他的入住須知上面完全沒有寫，要自行倒垃圾！令人非常生氣!!!!

The rooms are very clean.
There is plenty of cooking utensils available, and we were able to cook while looking at the spectacular view.
Nice beach, nice hike to Red Bluff viewpoint

Beautiful place to stay and friendly staff.
Everything is so perfect. Will come back again.
Spokojny kamping, komfortowy domek. Bardzo blisko do klifu. Dużo przestrzeni i niesamowite widoki
Good clean ensuite. Our camp site was clean, roads and facilities well maintained.  Camp kitchen was also clean and in good condition. Swimming pool requires some shade especially during summer

We were warmly welcomed at check in by friendly staff. Cabins are fairly new and are being excellently maintained & very well equipped throughoutfor a family stay, views are spectacular, overlooking the gardens, pool & ocean. Look forward to going back.
Only down fall would be no shade over the pool area in full sun.
Gorgeous view. Chalets were clean and spacious. Nice pool to swim. Would recommend

Camped here over Christmas and New Years, fully booked out and during school holidays. Staff were so friendly and helpful. Great views to Red Bluff. Pool was always sparkling, grounds were clean. Highly recommend even during busy times. All campsites have an ensuite, very clean, large showers. Dog friendly a bonus.
Thank you for a very relaxing Christmas

We started our trip here for 4 nights. The place is immaculate!! All powered sites are ensuit which was fantastic and super clean. Showers strong enough to peel the skin off your back! Heaps of roos come through during the night which was pretty exciting to see. Great location for fishing and only 5 minutes drive to main town. Highly recommend and will be back!
Very neat, tidy, spacious and comfy all at once. Whole family was satified overall.
Overall experience was good, had to get used to the silence from 9pm onwards. 9:30 pm is the noise curfew.

The Chrissy vibes haven’t ended in #Kalbarri 🎄✨

Because panoramic views and holiday cheer make the perfect blend for Boxing Day along the Coral Coast!

📸: CJMaddock
It was incredible seeing the whales was amazing and waking up to the kangaroos on the lawn was also amazing. 😝 (Ethan, 11).

Abused my elderly mum who has cancer, came over to intimidate her three times and invaded our personal space and demanded to know why she was visiting and rudely kicked her out of the pool when we were going to have a quick dip, lied to her about not being a Gday park while wearing a Gday shirt … She owns property on a Gday park and has a park pass for, big tall strong man treating my poor old mum as if she needed to be treated like a thieving pool using sneak who wants to steal hundreds of dollars from his grime pockets is so stupid there is 3 years worth of 1 star reviews showing how abusive and horrible these staff are I just hope more people read bad reviews and save their money for lovely people who don’t harm elderly women by making their poor old hearts fibrillate… Staff was to lazy to pick up the phone if they did she would of paid to say glad they didn’t get her money makes me sick they got ours just as rotten as they come
Awesome location, friendly staff and views to die for. En-suite bathroom was spotless.
Absolutely stunning 😍 place. It is very well designed and modern. Caring and lovely staff. We will definitely visit it again and stay even longer this time.

This place was amazing! The chalets are huge and have everything you could need.

The location is fantastic with lovely grounds and a fantastic backdrop of Red Bluff and the ocean. Really convenient to get to the Kalbarri National Park

But best of all, the staff. Janelle and Vicki were fantastic and couldn’t do enough for us. We thought the place and location was so good we extended our stay - and will be back!!

It’s a decent camp with clean setup. One problem booking with trip.com is that the site will ask for your credit card and then give the key. I arrived late and need to call a local number to get connected which is not convenient and they don’t accept whatapp or any other one line method.

The cleanest bathrooms/ toilet that I have ever seen … a very well run caravan park … one of the best that I have stayed at , peaceful , quiet
, I can’t rate it high enough , will definitely be back
Best camp ever! The ensuite restroom and shower felt like such a luxury! Kitchen is huge and well equipped. Location is excellent. We loved it!

Brilliant wee en suite. We pitched tents and was a great location very quiet for a good sleep. Beach a 2min walk away and top notch cooking facilities with everything you need. Very pleased with this accommodation.

Absolutely beautiful spot with very comfortable neat, clean and modern units.
The lady's out front where very accommodating to help find a parking spot for our camper while we stayed in a unit
Would certainly stay again , thankyou
Great other than the mice
Been a few years but I still offers a great holiday. Plenty of pristine sites .and a great new town look out.

Loved our stay here with ensuite powered sites. Beautiful location with a 4km walk to Kalbarri - we did this each morning along the path back along the beach. Nice pool and views of sunsets. One of my favourite spots on road trip to Exmouth.

Best caravan park we stayed since Darwin when we entered the journey with our Motorhome. All sites have ensuites and are generously sized. None of this 4 vans per power station like other parks. We also had an amazing view to Red Bluff. We we’re actually booked at another Park at Kalbarri but forfeited our payment and came here instead. Little out of town but it was worth the effort. Fairly new set up, big pool and great views. Definitely can’t recommend high enough.
The cabins are clean, spacious and comfortable.   Each cabin is oriented to take in the lovely view of the sea and cliffs. There are strict no noise rules after 9:30pm which is awesome.
On a powered ensuite site, staff were efficient and facilities were excellent - super close to the gorge walks, blue holes and shops. Highly recommend 🏆
No soap in the ensures, or dishwasher liquid in the kitchen. Camp-site is very exposed to the elements, so it was quite treacherous putting up our tent.
Nice clean and tidy place , Nice friendly staff. Great Location for sunsets

Simply put, the best caravan park we’ve had the pleasure of staying. Minutes walk from the beach, each site with its own beautiful, clean ensuite. The kitchen was well appointed and super clean, as was the park generally. A quiet, friendly stay. If you’re looking at accommodation in Kalbarri, this is it!

As a decorated, ex servicing military member of 13 years and travelling the great land of Oz for the last 7 months with my family, I would have to say this is the most inhospitable park we have stayed in to date.
Due to my current health conditions, I have been diagnosed with multiple health concerns, incl mental health conditions and am required to self medicate with percription medication.
This park apparently doesn’t allow for that !!! Being asked to leave the park by the manager, close to the middle of the night, when no one else is up and not disturbing anyone, was discrediting and distasteful.
I am a vetran, a husband, a father of 2 with no criminal history what so ever and i was made to feel like a 18 year old druggie and that couldn't be more further from the truth.

Summerstar head office needs to really think about who represents thier young company. A good start would be getting rid off the ancient mentality of management within this park.
Looks great but didn't stay

I met a helpful administrator. I arrived at the campground without a reservation that afternoon at 9/2 4pm, but the administrator was very kind and helpful in handling check-in related matters.
It's a pleasure to meet such enthusiastic people.
By the way, We was in problem in booking on website and Credit card have pre-paid issue, thanks again for your kind help.
Fantastic park very very clean

The location and views alone are gorgeous but what tops it off is that the facilities themselves are fantastic quality too. There is an abundance of amenities that make you feel comfortable and at home, if you bring your own food there’s not really a need to go anywhere!

We felt the service was great, the staff were friendly and explained everything to us clearly, there are notices in the rooms letting you know what needs to be done prior to leaving (not much at all), which I felt was a nice touch rather than just sneaking on a big fine at the end.

Definitely will have to return here again :-)
Red bluff is pristine, lodges are clean and comfortable by far the best park to date on this Rd trip, highlight of the park is watching sunsets and whales from the veranda.
Great modern amenities, clean park and friendly staff.
Great view, good all abilities access

Services is very bad, never reply email to answer our question.

They are rude to us maybe because we are asian

I won’t come here again anymore
A bit expensive, but what isn't up here. Terrific view out over the ocean. All new facilities.  All sites flat and level. Most have ensuites. Lots of cabins of various sizes.
Absolutely loved our stay at this Camp. Has 14 days in total.
vista oceano sul Red Bluff. Cottage nuovissimo con posizione invidiabile.Dotazione da 5 stelle. un eccellente Wi Fi Consigliatissimo

Fantastic new park at Red Bluff. Everything is new and sparkling ✨️ clean.
Very well kept lawns and grounds.
We stayed in Cabin 112. All cabins are brand new, self-contained, spacious, clean and have panoramic views over the big swimming pool. From the balcony you can see Red Bluff and out to the Indian Ocean. Watch the sun go down over the sea.
Very highly recommended, we will definitely come back. 👍
Quiet with large easy to access sites. Ensuites are also large and clean.

Myself and family of five stayed in a premium chalet which was very spacious and clean. Modern with air con in bedrooms as well as main area. Unfortunately we were in chalet #113 which has a water glimpse in the far distance and right on the corner of the main road. Very noisy from 6am onwards. I suggest if you want to watch the sunset as described in the details you should ring because we were led to believe when we booked online all the chalets had this.
Overall great accommodation but would probably stay in town next time.
We stayed in a chalet, it was just beautiful. Was so clean, spacious and comfortable. Couldn’t recommend enough!!!  Watching whales swimming past from our deck made it even more spectacular.

This park is lovely, reception was very welcoming.
nice size grass sites and very neat and tidy. Lovely clean facilities and enquires.
Lovely grassy campsite and great facilities. Local wildlife munching away at the grass during the night 😊

We stayed on a powered site with a ensuite for 2 nights. The best caravan park I have ever been too. The location was perfect and the whole site was so clean. The amenities such as the camp kitchen and the ensuite (shower and bathroom) were great!! Definitely will be back.
Straight across from the one of many Beach's
Brilliant little park. We only stayed over night on a caravan site with family in cabin. Very positive experience all round. Friendly, clean, easy. Thanks Red Bluff Caravan Park
Private ensuite powered site was private, clean and beautiful location. Camp kitchens and laundry were well supplied with amenities. A little bit out of town, but stunning views. We’ll be back
Great campsite, close to the beach, nice and modern ensuites for campers
Best caravan park we have ever stayed in! Incredible location right by the beach and surf. Facilities are fabulous and spotlessly clean!

We had an amazing caravan stay. The ensuite powered sites are very well appointed, the ensuite’s are roomy and secure. The showers are amazing with very strong & very hot water. The staff gave us a warm welcome and goodbye to bookend our stay. The resident Kangaroo was a cool surprise. Be aware they’re around at night when taking the dog to the toilet (bit of a shock on night one hehe) Pet friendly in school holidays was really appreciated too as no other parks in town we’re taking bookings with pets in school holidays. The whole park is very flashy, clean and comfortable and the red bluff beach and scenery is breathtaking.

We stayed on powered caravan site  10 nights. Beautiful park, well set out with ensuite’s. Foot towels for shower & loo paper supplied. Good camp kitchen & laundry. Resident kangaroo for guests enjoyment & park poop scoops each day to keep clean. Pool looked great but too cold to swim. Short walk to beach. Loved this park, highly recommend.

We came for a camping holiday just with tent and swags. The grassed site is clean and tidy. The ensuite shower and toilet is great. It's a really nice park very well run. Dog friendly also which is fantastic. Our little dog has really been great in her first camping trip. Next time we are back we may bring a camper trailer
We stayed 2 nights at powered ensuite site and it was AMAZING! Clean private bathroom, very strong and warm shower, well equipped shared kitchen, and cute wild kangaroos visiting at night. Love it!
Fantastic camp grounds with ensuite .

Really enjoyed my stay here. We stayed in the holiday units and they were amazing. Really clean and maintained, the beds were comfortable and cozy, great ocean views and friendly staff. Would definitely stay here again when I return to Kalbarri.

Recently stayed at this park and absolutely loved it, beautiful green grass large ensuite sites. Safe and clean, the pool could be slightly warmer. Thanks guys for making our stay so memorable. Also great sunset from the nearby beach.

We were in the campgrounds, which had ample space, and included an ensuite. The ensuite was very clean as were the whole grounds. There are a variety of quality stay options in this park from chalet,  private house to caravan/RV and tents. A short walk to the Bluff at sunrise or sunset followed by a swim in the amazing pool area! Staff were comfortable, like family.
Amazing park with spectacular view.

Great stay at this park.  It was really nice to have an ensuite.  While the park is out of town it was only a couple of minutes drive to the stores.  The staff were very good and observable attending to the cleanliness and care of park.  The camp kitchen was very good.

My experience at Kalbarri Red Bluff Tourist Park was nothing short of exceptional. The awe-inspiring ocean views from the veranda, the inviting swimming pool, the friendly staff, and the luxurious villa all contributed to an unforgettable stay.

The cabins are about 4 years old. They are spotless and the park is beautiful maintained. The pool is lovely and could see the manager check water quality morning and night. We stayed 2 nights but wished we had longer. Very relaxing with beautiful verandah and incredible view. Easily the best park we have ever stayed at.
Recent geopend par. Mooie ligging maar wel buiten het centrum. Zwembadwater heel koud. Prima bed, goede voorzieningen jn het huisje. Kangoeroes op t terrein bij dusk
